Library.title: LIBRARY
Library.subtitle: Discover the ancestry and legacy of cinema.
Library.rootPending: {count, plural, one {# root video waiting} other {# root videos waiting}}
Library.empty: Your library is empty. Click Scan Now to add movies.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.subtitle: Configure your film genealogy experience
Settings.modelDesc: Choose the LLM for genealogy analysis
Settings.baseUrlDesc: Configure the API endpoint for model requests
Settings.tmdbApiKeyDesc: Used for metadata scraping, artwork downloads, and local NFO generation
Settings.tmdbApiKeyPlaceholder: Paste TMDB API key, or leave empty to clear
Settings.tmdbSaveFailed: Failed to save TMDB API key
Settings.tmdbTestFailed: Failed to test TMDB API key
Settings.manualScanDesc: Force a re-scan of the library folder
Settings.reconcileLibraryDesc: Scan the whole library and mark disappeared films as missing
Settings.scrapeMetadataDesc: Use TMDB to enrich unmatched films, download artwork, and write local NFO files
Settings.organizeRootDesc: Move direct media-folder videos into movie folders, then scrape metadata
Settings.cleanupMissingDesc: Delete database records already marked as missing
Settings.autoScanDesc: Watch the media directory for added, changed, and deleted files
Settings.autoOrganizeRootDesc: When auto scan is running, organize stable video files placed directly in the media root
Settings.noteDocker: If running in Docker, this must be a path mapped inside the container (e.g., /media). If running locally, use the absolute path to your movies folder.
Settings.noteRestart: Restart server required to apply changes for image serving.
